extension.summary: Stream Live Indian Channels & VOD Content From JioTV on Kodi
extension.description: Enjoy Live TV experience and Video on Demand content in Kodi.
extension.news:
v1.3.5 - Fixed: Resolved playback freeze issues on slow hotspot / mobile data networks by using robust main-thread GET requests with increased timeouts for CDN session cookie pre-fetching.
v1.3.4 - Fixed: Resolved stream timeout and playback interruption after a minute on Widevine DRM (MPD) channels by restoring CDN session cookie pre-fetching.
v1.3.3 - Fixed: Playback failure (HTTP 450 error) on some platforms using newer InputStream Adaptive versions by removing deprecated URL pipe headers and refactoring manifest/stream properties.
v1.3.2 - Fixed: Resolved playback failures and 401/403 errors on Widevine DRM (MPD) channels (such as Sony Network channels) by bypassing CDN User-Agent blocking.
v1.3.1 - Fixed: Resolved 'urlencode' scope shadowing playback error preventing standard live channels from playing.
v1.3.0 - Added: Full Extra Channels integration supporting M3U, JSON, and XML playlists with HLS/DASH manifest loading, piped headers, and custom ClearKey DRM. - Added: VFS-compliant template export/import system enabling users to export, customize, and reload playlists absolutely. - Added: "View Add-on Readme & Guides" scrollable native textviewer inside settings under Developer Tools. - Added: Segmented documentation (features.md, FAQs.md, best_practices.md) in mds/ with linked index in main README.md. - Fixed: Auto-mapping legacy com.clearkey.alpha DRM type to Kodi-standard org.w3.clearkey for custom streams. - Fixed: Removed redundant test and example M3U files and cleaned up default template with Red Bull TV and Big Buck Bunny DASH. - Updated: FAQs resolving Issue #19 (stream source drops for DTamil/local channels) and Issue #20 (Vijay TV/Vijay Takkar subscription message limits, and buffering on static "Best" quality due to CDN throttling).
v1.2.5 - Fixed: Resolved startup race condition causing `Unknown addon id` popups. - Improved: Added startup resiliency loop to ensure services wait for addon registration. - Improved: Hardened addon initialization with explicit ID references.
v1.2.4 - Added: Background Token Refresh (Indefinite Login) mechanism to maintain active sessions. - Added: "Test Session Refresh" utility in Developer Tools for manual verification. - Improved: Captures and persists `refreshToken` for secure session renewal. - Added: User setting to toggle background refresh behavior in Account settings.
v1.2.3 - Optimized: OTP login validity set to 10 days to align with Jio's actual server-side token expiration. - Added: Automatic re-authentication flow (addon now proactively triggers the login dialog upon detecting 419 Session Expired or 401 errors). - Improved: Added debugging logs for login responses to help troubleshoot future authentication changes.
v1.2.2 - Fixed: Resolved `cannot import name 'translatePath' from 'xbmc'` crashing the hotspot network patch and playlist generation on Kodi 19+ (Matrix/Nexus/Omega). - Added: New `Copy kodi.log to Folder` utility located in `Settings` -> `Developer Tools` to easily export and share Kodi error logs. - Improved: Added instructions in the README on how to extract logs to aid in bug reporting.
v1.2.1 - Added: Support for 29+ Star/Nat Geo/Disney Network channels via new API endpoint hybrid unification - Fixed: Resolved `Languages` and `Genres` menus failing to load due to invisible JSON payload BOM crashes - Improved: Extensive FAQ segment implemented into documentation for troubleshooting and capability explanations
v1.2.0 - Added: Global Network Hotspot Fix (Bypasses Android IPv6 broken routes via advancedsettings for seamless hotspot streaming) - Fixed: VOD Catchup and Live TV intermittent freezing and connectivity errors - Improved: Persistent non-blocking background connections (TLS pooling) for dramatically faster start times and fluid Kodi UI - Fixed: EPG metadata and updated source to a more stable structure - Fix: Included missing UI string translations, PVR integration updates, and devtools.
v1.1.5 - Added: Favourite management features (Backup, Restore, Share, Restore-Shared) - Fixed: EPG data source (Updated to daily maintained source and enabled manual override in settings) - Improved: Backup path for account settings to persist even upon addon removal and reinstallation
v1.1.4 - Channel Fixes & Core Stability
v1.1.3 - Added: Self-updating repository support (automatic updates for zip installations) - Fixed: VOD playback stability (addressed 400 and 403 errors) - Fixed: "context object" and "AttributeError" in menus - Fixed: Channel listing crashes (Graceful handling of missing EPG data) - Fixed: "ref() got unexpected keyword argument" in catchup menus - Improved: API request encoding and User-Agent for VOD streams - Improved: Default resolution settings for HD channels (1080p)
v1.1.2 - Fixed "context has no attribute: add_item" error in menus - Added: Safety Shield (Auto Backup & Restore for account settings). - Fixed: Addon update failures on Windows (Faster service shutdown).
extension.disclaimer: This plugin is not officially commissioned/supported by Jio. The trademark "Jio" is registered by "Reliance Corporate IT Park Limited (RCITPL)"
